ddls:
CREATE TABLE "digital_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each digital asset */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the digital asset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the digital asset */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the digital asset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the digital asset was uploaded */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of digital asset (e.g., video, image, document) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension of the asset */,
  "asset_status" TEXT /* Status of the asset (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset type (e.g., video, image, document) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon associated with the asset type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., duration, resolution, format) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metadata value (e.g., integer, string, datetime) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_metadata_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the digital asset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, contributor, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_asset_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the permission expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_asset_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_asset_permissions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the mention belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was mentioned */,
  "mention_date" TEXT /* Date the mention was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset the task belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the task is assigned to */,
  "task" TEXT /* Text of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the assignment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the task is assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset the tag belongs to */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Text of the tag */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the tag (e.g., color, location, object) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_tags_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  "results" INTEGER /* Number of results returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset the rating belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the rating was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_ratings_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id")
)
